008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
024
025/**
026 * Subclass of parser session objects for byte-based parsers.
027 *
028 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
029 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
030 * </ul>
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
033 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
034 * </ul>
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
038   "resource" // Resource management handled by ParserPipe
039})
040public class InputStreamParserSession extends ParserSession {
041
042   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
043   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
044
045   /**
046    * Builder class.
047    */
048   @SuppressWarnings({
049      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
050   })
051   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ParserSession.Builder<SELF> {
052
053      private InputStreamParser ctx;
054
055      /**
056       * Constructor
057       *
058       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
059       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
060       */
061      protected Builder(InputStreamParser ctx) {
062         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
063         this.ctx = ctx;
064      }
065
066      @Override
067      public InputStreamParserSession build() {
068         return new InputStreamParserSession(this);
069      }
070
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
075    */
076   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
077
078      DefaultBuilder(InputStreamParser ctx) {
079         super(ctx);
080      }
081   }
082
083   /**
084    * Creates a new builder for this object.
085    *
086    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
087    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
088    * @return A new builder.
089    */
090   @SuppressWarnings({
091      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
092   })
093   public static Builder<?> create(InputStreamParser ctx) {
094      return new DefaultBuilder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
095   }
096
097   private final InputStreamParser ctx;
098
099   /**
100    * Constructor.
101    *
102    * @param builder The builder for this object.
103    */
104   protected InputStreamParserSession(Builder<?> builder) {
105      super(builder);
106      this.ctx = builder.ctx;
107   }
108
109   /**
110    * Wraps the specified input object into a {@link ParserPipe} object so that it can be easily converted into
111    * a stream or reader.
112    *
113    * @param input
114    *    The input.
115    *    <br>This can be any of the following types:
116    *    <ul>
117    *       <li><jk>null</jk>
118    *       <li>{@link InputStream}
119    *       <li><code><jk>byte</jk>[]</code>
120    *       <li>{@link File}
121    *       <li>{@link CharSequence} containing encoded bytes according to the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#binaryFormat(BinaryFormat)} setting.
122    *    </ul>
123    * @return
124    *    A new {@link ParserPipe} wrapper around the specified input object.
125    */
126   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
127   public final ParserPipe createPipe(Object input) {
128      return setPipe(new ParserPipe(input, isDebug(), ctx.isAutoCloseStreams(), ctx.isUnbuffered(), getBinaryFormat()));
129   }
130
131   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
132   public final boolean isReaderParser() { return false; }
133
134   /**
135    * Binary input format.
136    *
137    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#binaryFormat(BinaryFormat)
138    * @return
139    *    The format to use when converting strings to byte arrays.
140    */
141   protected final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat() { return ctx.getMarshallingContext().getBinaryFormat(); }
142
143   /**
144    * Returns whether this binary parser has a native byte-array wire type.
145    *
146    * <p>
147    * Mirror of {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.OutputStreamSerializerSession#hasNativeBytes()}
148    * for the parse side.  When {@code true}, {@code byte[]} payloads are consumed natively from the
149    * binary stream (e.g. MsgPack {@code bin} family, CBOR byte-string major type 2, BSON binary
150    * subtype {@code 0x05}) and {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps.BinarySwap} skips so the raw bytes
151    * reach the bean property directly.  When {@code false} the parser surfaces {@code byte[]}
152    * payloads as a string (UTF-8 column for Parquet, plain literal for binary RDF) and
153    * {@code BinarySwap} fires to apply the configured {@link BinaryFormat} reverse decoding back
154    * to {@code byte[]}.
155    *
156    * <p>
157    * Defaults to {@code true}.  Subclasses without a native byte-array wire type
158    * (e.g. {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet.ParquetParserSession} and the binary RDF parser
159    * sessions) override and return {@code false}.
160    *
161    * @return {@code true} if this parser has a native byte-array wire type.
162    */
163   public boolean hasNativeBytes() {
164      return true;
165   }
166}
